title: Exploring a New Studio
article_text: We explore a new studio today, and I slowly wake up to the bright morning light. My finger touches the cold frame of the window, and I feel a strong bond with this place. The internal design is proper for a creative space, and a chain of rooms connects the division between work and relax. A tourist might find this studio relevant to local art, but a victim of bad leadership could feel threatened by the lack of commitment. We must hire a guide who shows real commitment to explore every hole and corner. The literature on this area does not necessarily mention the studio, but we will find it. I should not tie my hopes to one plan, because a team with good leadership can form a strong bond. If a component breaks, we will fix it quickly. The bright colors in the frame make the studio look bigger. I wake up slowly and think about the chain of events that brought me here.
